scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run generate-sitemap && npm run validate && next build
scripts.lint: npx htmlhint public/*.html && (ls public/*.css >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx stylelint public/*.css || true)
scripts.format: npx prettier --write public/*.html public/*.css public/*.js public/*.mjs public/*.json public/*.yml public/*.md *.js *.mjs *.json *.yml *.md
